question.label: Priority ranking
question.name: If you had to cut your work in half tomorrow, what would you drop first — and what's non-negotiable?
question.description: Forces a real priority ranking. Vague answers are a clarity signal.

answer: I want to start by getting clarity on next quarter ownership before the billing rewrite lands on me.

assessment.note: She names next-quarter ownership as the non-negotiable priority, which shows a clear focus while also revealing unresolved ownership uncertainty before the billing rewrite.

history.answer_excerpt: If there is a bigger scope conversation, I want it sooner rather than later.
A clear next-step path would help me reset my energy.
The launch went well, but this week I feel flatter than I expected.
Mostly cleanup and reviews right now, not much that feels new.
I am proud of the migration plan and how we handled the cutover.
I did mention mentoring before. I still want it, but I stopped pushing.
I want to start by getting clarity on next quarter ownership before the billing rewrite lands on me.
I am not sure what I am owning next quarter yet, and that makes me uneasy.
I have felt a bit stuck doing similar work for months.
If there is a bigger scope conversation, I want it sooner rather than later.
A clear next-step path would help me reset my energy.
I want to start by getting clarity on next quarter ownership before the billing rewrite lands on me.

A clear next-step path would help me reset my energy.
